Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTRANSFPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid_TitlesCategories.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &TrsSts = nullvalue(&TrsSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Transferência Estoque Produtos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &TrsDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &TrsDtaEms_To = serverdate() &TrsDtaEms = serverdate() - 15 EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &Update.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' TrsCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TrsDtaEms.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TrsTip.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TrsSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TrsSaiFilCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TrsSaiFilRaz.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TrsSaiPedCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TrsEntFiLCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' TrsEntFilRaz.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' TrsEntPedCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' &OqFaze.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn' &Imprimir.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &Update.Visible = 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = wpTransfProduto.Link(EmpCod, TrsCod, 0) &OqFaze.Clear() &OqFaze.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (TrsSts = Status_Pedido.Aberto) &OqFaze.AddItem(1, 'Fechar Transf.') Endif If (TrsSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO) &OqFaze.AddItem(2, 'Abrir Transf.') Endif If (TrsSts = Status_Pedido.Aberto) &OqFaze.AddItem(3, 'Cancelar Transf.') Endif If (TrsSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) &OqFaze.AddItem(4, 'Reabrir Transf.') Endif If &OqFaze.Count = 1 &OqFaze.Class = !'Invisible' Else &OqFaze.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &Imprimir = !'' If TrsSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO &Update.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughFirstColumn' TrsCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' TrsDtaEms.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' TrsTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' TrsSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' TrsSaiFilCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' TrsSaiFilRaz.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' TrsSaiPedCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' TrsEntFiLCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' TrsEntFilRaz.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' TrsEntPedCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' &OqFaze.ColumnClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &Imprimir.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough' Else &Update.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' TrsCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TrsDtaEms.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' Do Case Case TrsTip.ToString().Trim() = !"I" TrsTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case TrsTip.ToString().Trim() = !"D" TrsTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case TrsTip.ToString().Trim() = !"R" TrsTip.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise TrsTip.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase Do Case Case TrsSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO TrsSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell' Case TrsSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO TrsSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughSingleCell' Otherwise TrsSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase TrsSaiFilCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TrsSaiFilRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TrsSaiPedCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TrsEntFiLCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TrsEntFilRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' TrsEntPedCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' &OqFaze.ColumnClass = 'WWActionGroupColumn' &Imprimir.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ // sdtFichaEstoque__PedCod.Link = VerPedido.Link('', &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.EmpCod, &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.FilCod, &sdtFichaEstoque.CurrentItem.PedCod) // sdtFichaEstoque__PedCod.LinkTarget = '_blank' if not TrsSaiPedCod.IsEmpty() TrsSaiPedCod.Link = VerPedido.Link('wwTransfProduto', EmpCod, TrsSaiFilCod, TrsSaiPedCod) TrsSaiPedCod.LinkTarget = '_blank' TrsEntPedCod.Link = VerPedido.Link('wwTransfProduto', EmpCod, TrsEntFiLCod, TrsEntPedCod) TrsEntPedCod.LinkTarget = '_blank' endif // parm(in:&DeOndeVem, in:EmpCod, in:FilCod, in:PedCod); if TrsSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO //&Update.Link = '' //&Update.FromImage(Actiondisplay) &Update.Visible = 0 EndIF EndEvent Event &OqFaze.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &OqFaze = 1 Do 'Do FecharTrans' Case &OqFaze = 2 Do 'Do AbrirTransf' Case &OqFaze = 3 Do 'Do Cancelar' Case &OqFaze = 4 Do 'Do ReabrirTransf' EndCase &OqFaze = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event FecharTrans_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcFechaTransferencia.Create(EmpCod, TrsCod, 'F') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event FecharTrans_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirTransf_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcFechaTransferencia.Create(EmpCod, TrsCod, 'A') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirTransf_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Cancelar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcFechaTransferencia.Create(EmpCod, TrsCod, 'C') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Cancelar_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ReabrirTransf_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcFechaTransferencia.Create(EmpCod, TrsCod, 'A') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ReabrirTransf_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Insert_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Insert_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wcNovaTransferencia.Create('INS', &Context.EmpCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Insert_Modal.Close &Varchar = Insert_Modal.Result &AuxTrsCod = val(&Varchar) wpTransfProduto.Link(&Context.EmpCod, &AuxTrsCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharTrans' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ FecharTrans_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirTransf' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AbrirTransf_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Cancelar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cancelar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ReabrirTransf' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ReabrirTransf_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TRSCOD" &TrsCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TRSSTS" &TrsSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TRSDTAEMS" &TrsDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &TrsDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TRSCOD", "", not &TrsCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &TrsCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TRSSTS", "", not &TrsSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &TrsSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TRSDTAEMS", "", not (&TrsDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &TrsDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &TrsDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &TrsDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"TransfProduto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &Imprimir.Click RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS054.Link(EmpCod, TrsCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
